name: Gunja Tteokbokki
short_description: Orders pouring in, broth bubbling over, and the daily pressure of balancing the books! Manage your ingredients, cook tteokbokki to perfection, and run your very own shop in this culinary tycoon simulation game.
detailed_description:
14 Days of Chaotic Tteokbokki Madness!

"Order up! Wait — we're out of mala sauce?!" Don't let the cute looks fool you! Welcome to Gunjа Tteokbokki — a full-on hardcore(?) tteokbokki tycoon where breathless order rushes and tight inventory management are all part of the job!

D-14. Prove yourself and earn that full-time position!

Our adorable manager 'Baepsae' has just opened a tteokbokki shop — but your fate is sealed in just 14 days. Survive the customers' picky orders, restock your empty ingredient bins, and hit your sales target before time runs out. Can you survive the threat of early termination and turn Gunja Tteokbokki into the hottest spot in town?

★ Baepsae (Manager): The heart and soul of this shop. Her cute charm brings the customers in — but when the receipts start piling up, she's practically steaming from the ears.

What Makes This Game Great

1. Non-Stop Real Shop Chaos!

  • Check the flood of incoming orders, load your ingredients onto the burner, and cook! Answer phone orders on top of everything else — and put your multitasking skills to the ultimate test in this frantic kitchen.

2. Strategic Ingredient Ordering & Inventory Management

  • It's not just about cooking! At the end of each day, you'll need to place orders for tomorrow's ingredients. Manage your fast-depleting stock wisely — and keep an eye out for bonus ingredients that only appear on special days!

3. 4 Different Endings Based on Your Performance!

  • After the final tally on Day 14, your ending depends on Baepsae's total earnings, order success rate, and the number of ingredients you've unlocked. Watch out — if your sales are too low early on, you might face a dreaded early termination!

Controls Play your way — mouse or keyboard, whichever you prefer!

Developer's Note

"We wanted to go beyond a simple cooking tycoon and capture that real, nail-biting feeling of actually running a shop! We put an enormous amount of effort into the English localization so that players around the world can experience the charm of tteokbokki. (Endless thanks to our team member's family for the invaluable help with translation!) You might start playing with a casual mindset — and find yourself genuinely stressing over mara sauce inventory before you know it. We hope you have a wonderful time cooking alongside Manager Baepsae!"
